component.name: Toaster
component.description: Global toast notification system powered by Sonner.

useCases: Informational messages and system status updates

commonPatterns.name: mount-toaster
commonPatterns.description: Add the Toaster component once at the app root

commonPatterns.name: toast-with-action
commonPatterns.description: Toast with an undo or retry action
commonPatterns.composition: toast("Item deleted", { action: { label: "Undo", onClick: () => undoDelete() } })

commonPatterns.name: promise-toast
commonPatterns.description: Toast that tracks a promise lifecycle
commonPatterns.composition: toast.promise(saveData(), { loading: "Saving...", success: "Saved!", error: "Failed to save" })

antiPatterns.scenario: Multiple Toaster instances in the app
antiPatterns.reason: Causes duplicate toasts and unpredictable stacking
antiPatterns.alternative: Mount a single Toaster at the app root layout

antiPatterns.scenario: Using toasts for critical errors that require user action
antiPatterns.reason: Toasts auto-dismiss and can be missed
antiPatterns.alternative: Use AlertDialog for errors requiring acknowledgment

antiPatterns.reason: Excessive toasts desensitize users and create noise
antiPatterns.alternative: Reserve toasts for meaningful state changes

parentConstraints: Mount once at the root of the application

interactions.autoClose: Toasts auto-dismiss after a configurable duration

responsive.mobile: Full-width toasts at the bottom of the viewport
responsive.desktop: Fixed-width toasts at the configured position

accessibility.role: status (via aria-live region managed by Sonner)
accessibility.keyboardSupport: Tab to focus toast actions; Escape to dismiss
accessibility.screenReader: Toast message announced via live region
accessibility.focusManagement: Focus moves to toast action button when present

rules: Mount exactly one Toaster at the app root
Import toast from 'sonner' to trigger notifications — Toaster is only the renderer
Use toast.success, toast.error, toast.info for semantic variants
Do not use toasts for errors that require user acknowledgment — use AlertDialog instead
Toaster uses design system tokens (--popover, --popover-foreground, --border) for theming

aiHints.context: Mount a single Toaster at the app root. Trigger toasts via the toast() function imported from 'sonner'. Supports success, error, info, loading, and promise patterns. Theme is auto-integrated with design system tokens. Default theme is 'system'.
